content: Lydia: Fuckin' Thalmor pricks strut around like they own Skyrim. Bet they don’t even know which end of a sword to hold, too busy bending over for their Altmer overlords. Carriage Driver: Aye, and their fancy robes don’t hide the fact they’d scream like a milk-drinker if a real Nord like you put steel to their throats. Lydia: Gods, I’d love to split one open right now—watch that golden blood spray while MJR fills my ass from behind. Carriage Driver: Hah! That’s the spirit. Though I reckon your Vampire tart would burn the corpse just to spite you. Lydia: That bloodsucking cunt wouldn’t know honor if it fucked her in the grave. She’s too busy trying to steal MJR’s seed when it oughta be nourishing proper Nord heirs. Carriage Driver: Sounds like you two oughta settle it in the old way—whoever rides him hardest gets the title. Lydia: Oh, I’ll win. I take his cock deeper, scream louder, and don’t need undead tricks to keep up. Fuck, just thinking about him pounding me into next Sundas makes my cunt drip.

Lydia: Enough talk of that pale bitch—I’d rather focus on keeping my thane alive so he can wreck me proper later. These Thalmor bastards might try something stupid if we linger. Carriage Driver: Aye, best stay sharp. Skyrim’s full of knives in the dark, but none as deadly as a scorned woman with a vendetta. Lydia: Damn right. Let’s move.
